name: Iso11783IL_OPShowObject
title: Iso11783IL_OPShowObject
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPShowObject( dword objectID, dword show ); // form 1
description: The function shows or hides an object. The Show Object command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: object ID of the object to show or hide
